### What $100m leads  will teach you

Alex Hormozi reveals his proven strategies for customer acquisition. His companies use these exact methods to generate 20,000+ new leads per day across sixteen different industries. And, they do it using the eight “never-go-hungry” playbooks inside.


### 1

### Start here

$100M Leads sits atop the foundation of my first book, $100M Offers. It assumes you already have a Grand Slam Offer to sell - the stuff. Once you have an offer to sell, it creates the next problem–Who do I sell it to? This book is my answer to that question. Leads. Lots of leads.

### 2

### Learn how advertising really works

I reveal what makes advertising really work. Most entrepreneurs think about advertising the wrong way. Since they think about advertising the wrong way, they do the wrong stuff to get leads. You want to do the right stuff to get leads. This is the way.

### 3

### Get Leads

We learn advertising’s “core four.” There are only four ways to get leads. So if there is a most important “how to” section, it’s this one.

### 4

### How to never run out of leads again

We learn how to get other people (customers, employees, agencies, and affiliates) to do it all for you. And this completes the assembly of your fully functioning $100M Leads machine.

### 5

### Implementation Plan

We wrap up with a one-page advertising plan you can use to get more leads today.

## Alex Hormozi

is an American entrepreneur and investor.

He scaled four companies to $120M+ in cumulative sales across four different industries (software, service, e-commerce, and brick & mortar) in under 4 years without taking on outside capital.

He’s widely considered an acquisition and monetization expert. He and his wife are the managing partners of Acquisition.com, a portfolio of companies funded by their own private wealth. The companies generate $200,000,000 per year in aggregate.

He also makes mistakes and candidly shares his painful lessons with aspiring entrepreneurs to help them avoid his pitfalls.

# $100M Offers: How To Make Offers So Good People Feel Stupid Saying No (Hardcover)

$29.99

This book shows you how to make offers so good people feel stupid saying no. It took me from a failing business, where I couldn’t give my services away for free… **to making $36 dollars for every $1 spent.**

In that time, we generated over $120,000,000 across four different industries: service, e-commerce, software, and brick-and-mortar.

Inside this book, you will learn:

- **How To Charge a Lot More Than You Currently Are…**
- **How To Make Your Product So Good, Prospects Find A Way To Pay For It**
- **The Value Equation to make what you sell worth more than your prospects have ever received**

You don’t have to be the best. You just need to make people an offer so good they would feel stupid saying no.

If you want to take your business to the next level - It’s time to find out how to make offers. **This book shows how.**

Add to cart

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/Truckh_1000x.png?v=1695848115)

Description


**I took home more in a year than the CEOs of McDonalds, IKEA, Ford, Motorola, and Yahoo….combined….as a kid in my twenties….using the $100M Offer method. It works. And it will work for you.**

Not that long ago though, my business had gotten so bad that I literally couldn’t even give my services away for free. At the end of each month, I would look at my bank account hoping to see progress (but there wasn’t). I knew something had to change...but what?

Over the next 48 months, I went from losing money to making $36 for every $1 spent. In that time period, we generated over $120,000,000 across four different industries: service, e-commerce, software, and brick & mortar.

But, unlike everyone else, we didn’t have great funnels, great ads, or a wealthy niche. In fact, we didn’t even send emails until we had crossed $50M in sales(!). Instead, we were able to do this one thing really well….we created offers so good, people felt stupid saying no.

Here’s exactly what this book will show you how to do:

_…_ **How To Charge a Lot More Than You Currently Are…**

_…_ The Tiny Market Big Money Process we use to laser focus on niche markets overflowing with cash

_…_ The “Unfair” Pricing formula….how we 100x’d our pricing (and got more people to say yes….for real)

_…_ The Value Flip...so you never get price compared again (that’s a promise)

...The Virtuous Cycle of Price...use it to outspend your competition (for good) while using your product to attract the best talent.

_…_ **How To Make Your Product So Good, Prospects Find A Way To Pay For It**

_…_ The Unbeatable Value Equation….to make what you sell worth more than your prospects have ever received

_…_ The Delivery Cube….to make delivering your products and services cost less but provide more

_…_ The Trim & Stack Hack….to maximize profit using the absolute best delivery methods. (This has never been shared publicly and was how we made $17M in profit on $28M in revenue in a year when I was 28 years old).

_…_ **How To Enhance Your Offer So Much, Prospects Buy Without Hesitating**

_…_ The Scarcity Stack….how to use the three different types of scarcity in every offer you make (without lying) to get people to buy the moment you ask

_…_ The “Everyday” Urgency Blueprint... to get prospects to buy RIGHT NOW, using everyday life to create real, ethical time pressure

_…_ Unbeatable Bonuses...and watch your prospects' hesitations melt away as they begin reading their credit cards to you before you even finish!

_…_ God-mode Guarantees...so good they make anyone say yes (even people who would never normally consider buying). I’ll show you how to stack and layer all 4 types of guarantees together. I even give you my 13 favorite guarantees word-for-word to swipe for yourself.

_…_ Magic Naming Formula to get the absolute highest response rates and conversion rates from everything you do to get new clients _and so much more…_

The methods contained within this book are **so simple, so instantaneous,** and **so effective**, it’s as if they work by magic. If you implement even one tactic in this book, you’ll see the change in your prospects' demeanor. And you’ll know the $100M Offer method worked when you start hearing “What do I need to do to move forward?” ...before you even ask for the sale.

**If you want to get more prospects to reply to your ads for less advertising dollars and get them to say YES to breathtaking prices...then ADD TO CART, use its contents, and see for yourself.**

How to order?


When you're ready to learn how to make offers, click Add to cart & head to checkout.

### WHAT $100M OFFERS WILL TEACH YOU:

The only way to make money in business is through a value exchange, a trade of dollars for value. The offer is what starts that trade. Since the offer is what people pay you for, it is the lifeblood of any business. $100M Offers will show you how to make them and get it right on your first try.

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/icon-whiteh_1000x.png?v=1695848115)

### 1\. How to charge lots of money for stuff

What does it take to grow? Thankfully, just three simple things:

Get more customers, Increase their average purchase value.

Get them to buy more times.

Pricing moves all three and here you’ll see how to do it.

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/LineSegments_1000x.svg?v=1696082882)

### 2\. How to create your offer (You’ll see how to make something so good people line up to buy)

There are 4 things people want. Explore each part step by step using the Value Equation and make what you sell worth more than your prospects have ever received

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/BookBookmark_1000x.svg?v=1696082949)

### 3\. How to make this happen in the real world.

By now, you have enough to make far more sales, at higher prices, with more profit. Using what you’ve learned, it’s time to apply it.

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/t/15/assets/placeholder-imageh.svg?v=87916137838594299251762187179)

SECTION 1


### Start Here

The first chapter is all about nailing the fundamentals. What is an offer and why do you need it?

- **The 2 Main Problems:** The first chapter spells out the two problems most businesses face—you've not got enough clients and you’ve not got enough cash (excess profit at the end of the month). Understanding the issue is the first step to solving it.

- **Three Proven Paths to Explosive Growth:** We dive into the 3 fundamental ways to grow your business: getting more leads and increasing their value. This chapter serves as the foundation for everything that follows.


![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/offerRedSquare1_1000x.webp?v=1702425116)

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/Screenshot_2023-11-23_at_00.05.48_1000x.png?v=1700698028)

SECTION 2


### PRICING

In this section, we cover how to charge lots of money for stuff.

- **The Commodity Problem:** In this chapter, we talk about what everyone is doing and how to differentiate yourself from the marketplace. You’ll see how an offer solves this so you can become a category of one.

- **How to find the right market:** Next, We continue into the one advantage that always wins over your competitors. Even if you get everything wrong, if you do this, you can still make money.

- **How to charge what it’s worth:** The final step to making crazy money. Here you’ll see how to do things no one else can do - and how to make big bets without losing the farm.


SECTION 3


### VALUE - Create Your Offer

In this section, unlock the 4 elements of value and how to use the value equation

- **The Unbeatable Value Equation**: This chapter shows you the 4 primary drives of value to make what you sell worth more than your prospects have ever received.

- **Creating a Value Offer:** Brick by brick, we will walk through what pieces to offer (and why) and then the absolute best delivery methods to fulfill promises.

- **The Trim & Stack Hack**: After you get clear on what you’re offering, we’ll cover the absolute best delivery methods to fulfill promises and maximize profit. (This has never been shared publicly and was how we made $17M in profit on $28M in revenue in a year when I was 28).


![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/Screenshot_2023-11-23_at_00.10.02_1000x.png?v=1700698221)

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/offersredsquare2fixed_1000x.webp?v=1702425524)

Section 4


### Enhancing Your Offer

In this section, we’ll cover how to enhance your offer so much, prospects buy without hesitating

- **The Scarcity Stack:** In this chapter, you will see how to use the three different types of scarcity in every offer you make (without lying) to get people to buy the moment you ask

- **The “Everyday” Urgency Blueprint:** How to get prospects to buy RIGHT NOW, using everyday life to create a real, ethical invisible force that compels people to move forward.

- **Unbeatable Bonuses:** Here you will see how to stack the deck in your favor and get more people to buy now who otherwise wouldn’t.

- **God-mode Guarantees:** This section like before is another method so good they make anyone say yes (even people who would never normally consider buying). You’ll see how to stack and layer all 4 types of guarantees together. Plus, you’ll get your hands on 13 proven guarantees word-for-word to copy& paste for yourself.

- **Magic Naming Formula:** Finally, we’ll wrap up withhow to select the best name to get more people to reach out. And get the absolute highest response rates and conversion rates from everything you do to get new clients


Section 5


### Get Started

This final section has three chapters.

- **In a nutshell:** In this chapter, you will see a ”back of the napkin” bullet list to summarise everything you’ve learned and why.

- **Your first $100,000 in cash:** We’ll talk about how to use your new offer to make more $100,000 in cash, make more sales, at higher prices and with more profit.

# How to Get Strangers to Want to Buy Your Stuff

$119.96

This book contains the playbooks that took me from sleeping on my gym floor to **owning a portfolio of companies that generate $200 million per year in less than a decade.**

Today, our companies generate 20,000+ new leads per day across 16 different industries.

Inside this book, you will learn:

- **The key principles of how advertising really works.**

Description


**You can get 2x, 10x, or 100x more leads than you currently are without changing anything about what you sell…**

This book contains the playbooks that took me from sleeping on my gym floor to owning a portfolio of companies that generate $200,000,000 per year in under a decade. Wanna know the biggest difference between those two time periods? How many _leads_ I was getting.

The problem is - most business owners don’t know how to get leads.

**I wrote this book to solve your** _**LEADS**_ **problem.**

Today, our companies generate 20,000+ new leads per day across sixteen different industries. And, they do it using the eight “never-go-hungry” playbooks inside. Once you see them, you can’t unsee them. They’re so powerful, they work without your permission.

Inside you will find…

_…The easiest way to get another five customers tomorrow_

_…The hook-retain-reward system to transform content into leads_

_…The 6-part ad framework that gets more people - especially strangers - to want what you sell_

_…The_ _one_ _question that immediately turns any stranger (no matter how cold) into a hot lead_

_…The 7 direct referral methods responsible for 30% of my sales_

_…The affiliate playbook that gets hundreds of other businesses to advertise your stuff for free_

_…The agency agreement that gets them to teach you their lead-getting secrets at no cost_

_…The how-to-get-people-off-the-streets-and-getting-you-leads in under 2 weeks framework_

_…and everything else that got our companies boatloads of leads…fast._

And the best part is…you can use these playbooks to get more leads _within an hour_ of reading this book. You just have to know where to look…and the first place is inside.

**If you want to get more leads for your business...then ADD TO CART, use its contents, and see for yourself.**

How to order?


When you're ready to learn how find & convert leads using the $100m Leads framework, click Add to cart & head to checkout.

Here’s exactly what 100M leads will show you


In $100m Leads, you'll learn...

1. **Understanding Advertising:**

- _The secret reason big brands spend billions on advertising, yet you rarely see them make an outright sale..._
- _How mastering lead generation could instantly skyrocket your business growth._

**2\. Lead Generation Techniques**

- _The sneaky hook-retain-reward system that transforms ordinary content into a lead magnet._
- _What the top 1% of advertisers use as a 6-part framework to draw in a horde of potential buyers._
- _The truth about converting strangers into hot leads: Does it really boil down to just one magic question?_

**3\. Leveraging Referrals & Affiliates:**

- _How a simple method might be behind 30% of a businesses sales - and it's not what you think._
- _The elite's secret affiliate playbook that lets others promote your products without spending a dime._
- _Why most businesses are unaware of lead-getting secrets that cost them absolutely nothing._

**4\. Practical Playbooks & Frameworks:**

- The little known strategy that turns anyone into a lead generator in just weeks.
- How the pros use real-world advertising tactics to not just engage, but convert leads..
- What businesses with "$100M Leads" machines have in common - and it's not just money.

**5\. In-Depth Advertising Concepts**

- Why distinguishing high-quality leads from the rest could be the difference between a thriving business and a dying one.
- The secret attraction tactics used by the elite to reel in the most valuable leads.
- Not all leads are created equal. Uncover the two main types you should be aiming for.
- How a simple principle in advertising might exponentially get you results.

**6\. Getting Started**

- The "How" to kickstart advertising that most businesses overlook.
- Why integrating every learned strategy is the key to optimum lead generation, not just cherry-picking a few.
- The truth about resilience and perseverance in business, as told through a story that might change your perspective forever.

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/t/15/assets/Placeholder-Imageh.jpg?v=49460024173020463491762187179)

Announcing $100M Leads


#### Read these 273-pages if you want 2x, 5x or 100x your leads within the next 12 months

Use the tactics in this book and you’ll force leads to find you.

Before you can blink, you’ll have complete strangers attracted to you wanting to buy from you.

Using the $100M Leads method, it’s easier than ever to make a fortune because having lots of leads makes it easy to get rich and stay rich.

[DISCOVER $100m leads](https://shop.acquisition.com/products/2-100m-offers-2-100m-leads#shopnow)

### “Alex Hormozi is going to change the world by making your life better”

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/t/15/assets/STARSh.svg?v=183158286979890054491762187185)

by Drayke Jacobs-Van-Tol on AMAZON.COM

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/Placeholder-Lightboxh_1000x.jpg?v=1695848115)

### What $100m leads will teach you:

$100M Leads sits atop the foundation of my first book, $100M Offers. It assumes you already have a Grand Slam Offer to sell - the stuff. Once you have an offer to sell, it creates the next problem – Who do I sell it to? This book is my answer to that question. Leads. Lots of leads.

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/icon-whiteh_1000x.png?v=1695848115)

### 1\. How advertising works

A business without customers isn’t a business, it’s a non-profit. In $100m Leads, you learn how to get leads that are ready to buy whatever it is you sell. Discover the key principles & strategies of effective advertisting.

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/LineSegments_1000x.svg?v=1696082882)

### 2\. THE FOUR WAYS TO GET LEADS

Explore the core methods for lead generation: targeting people who know you and those who don't, through one-to-one and one-to-many strategies. Use these four ways and you'll never have a shortage of potential customers.

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/BookBookmark_1000x.svg?v=1696082949)

### 3\. TURN YOUR LEADS INTO FANS

Learn the art of converting your leads into die-hard fans of your brand. When leads become fans, they not only buy from you but also become your best promoters, making your lead generation exponentially more effective.

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/t/15/assets/placeholder-imageh.svg?v=87916137838594299251762187179)

SECTION 1


### Start Here

The first chapter is all about the basics: why you need leads.

- **The Core Issue:** The first chapter spells out the problem most businesses face—you're not getting as many leads as you'd like because you're not advertising enough. Understanding the issue is the first step to solving it.

- **Two Paths to Growth:** In the second chapter, we dive into the fundamental ways to grow your business: getting more leads and increasing their value. This chapter serves as the launchpad for everything that follows.


![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/Chapter-Image01h_1000x.png?v=1695848115)

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/Chapter-Image02h_1000x.png?v=1695848115)

SECTION 2


### Get Understanding

In this section, we cover three things to make sure advertising does exactly what we want it to do.

- **What Is a Lead?**: In this chapter, we go into what a lead actually means in the world of business. Understanding this is the first step to get them.

- **Quality Over Quantity**: Next, we delve into the crucial filtering of profitable leads from time-wasting ones. This chapter teaches you how to focus your efforts on leads that actually benefit your bottom line.

- **Effective Attraction Strategies**: Finally, I'll share my most effective techniques for capturing the interest of high-value leads. These are tried-and-true methods to get the leads that you want to work with.


SECTION 3


### Get Leads

This section is also divided into two chapters.

- **Types of People:** Before diving into how to get leads, it's crucial to understand the two types of people you'll be targeting: those who know you and those who don't. This chapter lays the groundwork.

- **Four Basic Ways:** Here, we'll break down the two fundamental paths for letting people know about your business—one-to-one and one-to-many—and show how they combine into the four basic ways to generate leads.


![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/Chapter_Image03_1000x.png?v=1696086088)

![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/Chapter-Image04h_1000x.png?v=1695848115)

Section 4


### Get Lead Getters

This part focuses on leverage as a way to generate more leads with less work.

- **The Lever Principle**: Inspired by the concept that an old lady can lift a semi-truck with a long enough lever, we explore how leverage works in the realm of advertising. This is where you'll learn to amplify your reach and results.

- **Advertising with Leverage:** Delve deeper into practical ways you can use the principle of leverage to make your advertising efforts far more powerful and effective.


Section 5


### Get Started

This final section has three chapters.

- **In the first chapter, Advertising in real life** \- I'll lay out my one big advertising rule. I'll give you my personal one-page advertising plan you can use to get more engaged leads, today.

- **In the next chapter, Putting It all Together** \- I'll lay out the roadmap to scale from your first few leads all the way to your $100M Leads machine.

- **Finally, A Decade In Page** \- I'll distill everything we learned into bullets to show how far we've come in our time together. Then, to send you on your way, I'll share a parable that has gotten me through even my hardest times.


![](https://shop.acquisition.com/cdn/shop/files/Chapter-Image05h_1000x.png?v=1695848115)

The Acquisition.com Scaling Workshop is a two-day event designed to provide business owners with the skills and tools to aggressively grow their businesses. This workshop is run by the same team that manages Alex and Leila’s $250 million annual earning portfolio. Our Scaling Workshops include a variety of learning formats, including keynote speakers from our portfolio team, Alex and Leila Hormozi, and special guests! ## FAQs

What is the Acquisition.com Scaling Workshop?

It's not an event. It's a workshop. At my office.

Expect zero motivational talks. Meaning - we get tactical.

On day one, we break down how we fast track growth, recruit top talent, and frameworks we use for "high return" decision making.

This is the same stuff we use in our portfolio.

On day two, we get hands on. We separate into small groups.

You meet with our directors (specialized in marketing, sales, people, profit, and strategy) to get personalized help.

How to register for a workshop

To register for the Acqusition.com Scaling Workshop, we require you to meet minimum requirements. Our Workshop Sales Team would love to talk to you about those requirements. [Click here](https://www.acquisition.com/vegasthankyou-ws?hsLang=en) to get started!

Who is the right fit for a workshop?

To determine if you are the right fit for the Acqusition.com Scaling Workshop, book a call to speak with a member of our workshop concierge team. We require you to meet some minimum entry requirements to be allowed in the room. These requirements include but are not limited to being active in business, a revenue threshold and operating in an industry where we are confident we can provide value. If this is of interest, book a call today to see if you are the right fit.

Who are the main speakers?

You will be introduced to the team that actively runs our portfolio. In addition, on the second day, you can look forward to breakout sessions with Acquisition.com subject matter experts so that no question is left unanswered by the time you leave.

![FOUNDERS](https://www.acquisition.com/hubfs/FOUNDERS.png)

Alex and Leila Hormozi are co-founders and managing partners of [Acquisition.com](http://acquisition.com/). In four years, the portfolio grew to over $250m+ in annual revenue. Before [Acquisition.com](https://www.acquisition.com/vegasthankyou-ws/Acquisition.com?hsLang=en) they founded Gym Launch, Prestige Labs, and ALAN. In 2021, a private equity sponsor purchased Gym Launch and Prestige Labs for $46.2M. And in that same year, a strategic buyer bought ALAN in an all stock deal.

Alex wrote two best selling books $100M Offers and $100M Leads, both of which have sold over 1M copies and are still #1 & #2 on Amazon for Marketing & Sales.

Their mission at [Acquisition.com](http://acquisition.com/) is to make real business education accessible to everyone. And to do that, they strive to build a business that improves the lives of everyone it comes in contact with. They built a culture of praise over punishment to make it happen. Alex and Leila have an audience of over 12M+ that subscribe to their business content across social media.

BRAND NEW

![$100m Scaling Roadmap](https://www.acquisition.com/hubfs/images/ACQ_100MScalingRoadmap-Roadmap-Stage.png)

What is the Acquisition.com Scaling Workshop?

The Acquisition.com Scaling Workshop is a two-day event designed to provide business owners with the skills and tools to aggressively grow their businesses. This workshop is run by the same team that manages Alex and Leila’s $250 million annual earning portfolio. Each day strategically provides you with impactful value, demonstrates tangible levers you should pull, and creates a clear path of how to solve your business-related constraints.

Our Scaling Workshops include a variety of learning formats, including keynote speakers from our portfolio team, Alex and Leila Hormozi, and special guests! In addition to these incredible speakers, you can look forward to breakout sessions with Acquisition.com subject matter experts so that no question is left unanswered by the time you leave.

Our goal is simple: help you scale in 2024!

How to register for a workshop

To register for the Acqusition.com Scaling Workshop, we require you to meet minimum requirements. Our Workshop Sales Team would love to talk to you about those requirements. [Click here](https://www.acquisition.com/vegasthankyou?hsLang=en) to get started!

How do I qualify for a workshop?

Simply book a call with our team to see if you qualify. The businesses that qualify most and see the most success from workshops range in revenue from $3m-$150m per year in revenue and have a well defined problem to solve.

Who are the main speakers?

You will be introduced to the team that actively runs the portfolio including Alex and Leila Hormozi. In addition, on the second day, you can look forward to breakout sessions with Acquisition.com subject matter experts so that no question is left unanswered by the time you leave.

# Alex Hormozi Writing Guideliness

# Keep Everything Below 3rd Grade Reading Level

We utilize leverage to gain higher returns on our equity checks ❌ We borrow money so we can buy bigger stuff (and make more) than we could with our cash alone. ✅

# Present Voice

When you’re creating your sales page When you create your sales page

# Active Not Passive

The body was carried out of the room We carried the body out of the room

Avoid Adverbs Whenever Possible (adverbs usually mean lame verbs)

We shut the door really hard ❌ We slammed the door ✅ Avoid words like “very, super, way, actually, etc”

# Simple/Short Sentences

Usually one comma

If two commas - cut the middle or make 2 sentences

We tried to escape but the man, with the red mask, chased us until we lost our

breath. ❌

The red-masked man chased us until we lost our breath. We were trapped. ✅

# Positive Language

Don’t Stop ❌

Keep Going ✅

Don’t leave the facility ❌

Stay inside

# Remove Redundant Words

We simultaneously left the building at the same time We left the building at the same time

# Remove Unnecessary Words

If they don’t change the meaning or add to the meaning of the sentence. 8 Guidelines For Writing I Live By ❌

8 Writing Guidelines I Live By ✅

He was able to get out of his car. ❌

He exited his car. ✅

Workshop FAQs

What is the Acquisition.com Scaling Workshop?

The Acquisition.com Scaling Workshop is a two-day event designed to provide business owners with the skills and tools to aggressively scale their businesses. This workshop is run by the same team that actively manages Alex and Leila’s portfolio. They are the ones teaching, not some professional presenters

You’ll get to ask questions directly to every expert and walk away with practical advice and strategies that can be implemented immediately to improve your business. (We have scaled companies across retail, e-com, software, info, business services, and many more.)

Our Scaling Workshops include a variety of learning formats. These include keynote speakers from our own portfolio team, including Alex and Leila Hormozi. In addition, you’ll take part in roundtables with Acquisition.com's own subject matter experts. Where we explore all the core functions of a business together from sales, marketing, client success, product and strategy, and content.

Our goal is simple: scale your business.

How Do I Qualify for a Scaling Workshop?

To qualify for the Acqusition.com Scaling Workshop, book a call to speak with a member of our workshop concierge team. We require you to meet some minimum entry requirements to be allowed in the room. These requirements include but are not limited to being active in business, a revenue threshold and operating in an industry where we are confident we can provide value. If this is of interest, book a call today to see if you qualify.

How Can I Bring a Guest to the Scaling Workshop?

Yes, we'd love for you to bring a guest or team member to the Scaling Workshop. Please note that guests are not included in the individual ticket, and we do not offer bundled or group discounts. Dates are also subject to availability.

In addition, we host Scaling Workshops at our actual headquarters. We only have physical space for a maximum of 100 business owners per workshop. Places are first come, first serve.

Where’s the workshop located?

All of our Scaling Workshop events are held on-site at our Acquisition.com headquarters at 2960 West Sahara Avenue, Las Vegas, NV 89102.

Will lodging and transportation be included in my Scaling Workshop ticket purchase?

No. When you purchase an Acquisition.com Scaling Workshop ticket, this includes access to the event over the two days. We do provide refreshments and an optional breakfast and lunch each day. However, all other meals, transportation, and stay accommodations are not included. We recommend using rideshare options to reach the Acquisition.com headquarters.

Where to stay and what to do in Las Vegas?

Provided you qualify for a workshop, on receipt of purchase, we will send you a guide for suggested accommodation, recommended restaurants, and fun activities to enjoy during your stay. Including some of Alex and Leila’s top spots to see. For further recommendations on where to stay, dine, and play, check out our exclusive Vegas Unlocked PDF Guide [HERE](https://www.acquisition.com/hubfs/Vegas%20Unlocked.pdf).

Will there be food, snacks, refreshments?

Yes, this is a privately catered event. You will be able to enjoy a light breakfast and refreshments in the morning on arrival. Plus, lunch and more beverages will be provided throughout each day. If you have any dietary restrictions, please contact our team at: [Workshops@Acquisition.com](mailto:Workshops@Acquisition.com). after you have secured a spot and they will be more than happy to accommodate.

What about dietary restrictions, what foods do you offer?

We've got you covered! We offer an array of gluten-free, vegetarian, and vegan options for our buffet-style meals. If you have any dietary restrictions, please contact our team at: [Workshops@Acquisition.com](mailto:Workshops@Acquisition.com).

What time does the Scaling Workshop start and end each day?

Doors open each morning at 8:00 a.m. for attendee registration, check-in and networking with light fare provided We recommend arriving prior to 8:00 a.m. if you would like a specific seat in the workshop event space as all seats are first-come, first-serve. Additionally, during colder months, we recommend bringing a coat as the waiting space occasionally expands to  outside.

The Scaling Workshops begin at 9:30 a.m. and end at 6 p.m., with doors closing at 6:30 p.m. on Day One. On Day Two the workshop begins at 9:00 a.m., and and ends at 6:00 p.m., with doors closing at 6:30 p.m. We ask all attendees to schedule their rides or exit the building each day by this time so our team can prepare the space for the next event.

Please let us know if you have ADA seating requirements and we will be happy to facilitate.

Where do I find my workshop itinerary?

Your Scaling Workshop itinerary will be sent to you in advance of your attendance date via the email you provided the Acquisition.com Business Consultant team. If you have **not** received any emails from the Acquisition.com Workshop Team, or information about your upcoming Scaling Workshop, please contact our Workshop Team at: [Workshops@Acquisition.com](mailto:Workshops@Acquisition.com).

How should I prepare for the workshop?

In the weeks leading up to your Scaling Workshop date, you can expect to receive a specialized Acquisition.com pre-work packet that is designed to help prepare for the workshop! As long as you’ve received the welcome email after purchasing your workshop ticket, no action is needed on your part to automatically receive this information! If you have not received a welcome email, please reach out to the Concierge Workshop Team: [Workshops@acquisition.com](mailto:Workshops@acquisition.com).

What’s the Scaling Workshop format each day?

Each day will vary but the overall event will consist of speakers, Q&A, roundtables, workbook activities, breakfast, lunch, and refreshments. Each day is tailored to ensure you are provided the tools and skills to aggressively grow your business.

Who are the main speakers?

You will be introduced to the team that actively runs our portfolio including Alex and Leila Hormozi. In addition, on the second day, you can look forward to breakout sessions with Acquisition.com subject matter experts so that no question is left unanswered by the time you leave.

What should I bring to the workshop?

We recommend that attendees bring an open mind and an eagerness to learn! The Acquisition.com team will provide pens, a Scaling Workshop workbook and name tags for easy networking. You are welcome to bring your own writing materials (however we will provide). note we do not allow laptops or cellphones in the workshop event space to create an intimate environment optimized for learning.

Can I hire the Acquisition.com team members directly to help me scale my business?

No. Our Acquisition.com team is not available to hire for individual project work outside of the Scaling Workshops or our portfolio companies. If you’re interested in potentially becoming an Acquisition.com portfolio company, we welcome you to contact [Workshops@Acquisition.com](mailto:Workshops@Acquisition.com). Can I change my workshop date?

Absolutely! Our Scaling Workshop Transfer Policy (seen here in our [Terms and Conditions](https://www.acquisition.com/workshoptcs?hsLang=en)) allows each attendee to reschedule one (1) time within six months of the original workshop purchase date. There is a $100.00 transfer fee, and our Workshop Team would be happy to help facilitate this change. Please note that transfer requests within 72 hours of the registered workshop date will not be accepted.

Exclusions do apply: Changes within 72 hours of the workshop date can only be made in the event of travel-related issues such as VISA problems, flight delays or cancellations or illnesses.

What is your cancellation and refund policy?

If an event cancellation occurs, registered participants will receive a full refund within 60 days of said cancellation. If any event is postponed, registration for impacted attendees will transfer to the next available event date.

There are no refunds for any Acquisition.com Workshop Event purchases.

More information can be found for the Acquisition.com Scaling Workshop cancellation and refund policy in our [Terms and Conditions](https://www.acquisition.com/workshoptcs?hsLang=en).

My plans changed, can I transfer my ticket to someone else?

If you’re hoping to transfer your workshop ticket, please reach out to our Workshop Team at [Workshops@Acquisition.com](mailto:Workshops@Acquisition.com). They will be happy to work with you on transferring the ownership to someone else.

No. We ask that all Scaling Workshop participants refrain from using their laptop computers, cell phones and other electronic devices during the workshop presentations. Is there a code of conduct?

Yes. Please see our Participate Conduct section in our [Terms and Conditions](https://www.acquisition.com/workshoptcs?hsLang=en). In order to provide each attendee with the best experience possible at the Scaling Workshop, Participant Conduct is heavily enforced.

What's the best time to arrive at HQ to beat the Las Vegas heat?

For your safety and comfort, we recommend arriving at HQ as close to the 8:00 AM PDT start time as possible. The heat in Las Vegas can quickly intensify, and we want to ensure you don't have to stand outside in the sun for long periods. Thank you!

Yes. Our Security team is here to ensure a safe environment for all of our guests.
